Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Nothing negative enough to make a comment about   2 stations in very short walking distance great power shower interior is to a very decent standard i stay in London a lot at various hotels I didn t think it was bad value at all especially compared to some would use again

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The fire alarm went off at midnight and I had to ring the front desk to find out what was going on as there was no contanct  The bed was so nice extremely comfy Staff were very helpful lovely pizzareia just down the road too

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The given room was more like a renovated storage room It was a corner room with a weird layout and we needed to walk two steps up from the corridor Room Bed Two beds are placed one feet apart from each other with one bed located just a feet away from the window Because of the jogged wall at the end of the bed that one feet from the window is blocked by the bed With that few steps up going to the room and the duct for air conditioning the ceiling is very low We do not feel comfortable A sofa bed is placed three feet in front of the closet We do not understand the purpose of it we did not request for a sofa bed given that the room is already very cozy That is why we felt like it is a storage room more than anything Area Safety A random fake tourist asked for direction and two fake policemen came to ask for our passport just a block away from the hotel We said No and walked away We have heard this kind of scam for tourists at other countries before We also heard frequent police sirens around the area after eight We just feel unsafe We thought that we were in some bad areas in NYC or Chicago Breakfast The waitress did not replace the tea cup plate and spoon after use and she wiped them with the cloth which was just used to clean the table We were eye rolling   Location One block away from Kilburn Park station and Paddington is just a few stations away

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room with no windows Confusion over price of breakfast 3 different staff wanting charge different prices to all 3 rooms booked under my name  location very helpful with ordering taxis for venues

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Empty mini bar in all 3 rooms despite each paying 50 deposit Expensive breakfast so went to pub instead   Clean room friendly staff good location taxi booking service

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I booked it online with my bank card reserving my two nights stay I paid for the room with my credit card only to find out on the Monday they had taken the payment for the room from my bank card too So I paid for the room twice total piss take The staff were rude and there English was poor

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Check in was slow they had lost our paperwork Used wine glass lying in the corridor at 3 30pm Room was extremely small Had to climb over one bed to get to the other and climb over both beds to get to the window Lots of scuff marks on the walls in the room The housekeeper barged into the room in the morning without knocking whilst I was using the toilet He got a full eye full mumbled an apology and went out again This is despite a DND sign on the door and some obviously useless high tech light system they have for each room showing if the occupants are sleeping or require a service Very noisy from surrounding rooms and in corridor Not noisy guests but you could here every footstep door close and conversations going on No need for an alarm clock because everybody wakes up when the first person in the hotel wakes up and walks across the room   Location was good bed was comfortable and we had everything we needed

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Receptionist on Tuesday November 8 was very unfriendly I had to wait 10 minutes until she showed up at the reception no more key cards available hotel ran out of key cards room had no window which was not mentioned on booking com when reservation was made online loud traffic noise outside during most of the night and the worst of all heating was not working with nearly zero degrees outside an awful experience

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Having to pay a 50 deposit This is the first time I have ever had to do this Why The key card for the door didn t work and took 4 more new cards before I could get into my room after the machine terminal had to be fixed Good thing I wasn t in a rush Noise Every time someone used the toilet or took a shower you could eat the water from it in the room and it was quite loud Dusty cups and kettle They were covered in dust and fluff as if they had not been used in weeks the rest of the room was clean   The room was quite small but very cosy The temperature for the room was very easy to adjust The shower is lovely and is very warm Very friendly staff The food was nice and not overly expensive Comfy bed Good lighting Great location very near two train stations on different lines No windows this could be perceived as good or bad

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: In the morning when I was supposed to arrive at the hotel I saw a payment on my card s statement toward the hotel for the whole amount of the 2 rooms I booked around 900 euros and not informed about that at the booking s moment Once arrived they explained me that they had just freezed the money and that I would have been able to see them in 3 to 5 days and I therefor decided to pay with a different card Now what is scandalous is that after 6 working days I still don t see the considerable amount on my card and calling the hotel I just got always the same answer you have to wait few more days Well guess what this hotel got in one day 1800 euros for two rooms and I am still waiting to get back my 900 This can t and must not happen

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Dirty towels in room When I checked out the lady at reception didn t seem interested in my complaint I rang the hotel the next day to speak to a manager and was just fobbed off by another rude lady at reception The lady that I spoke to on the phone after I voiced my concerns said it s only a towel Will definitely not be staying again Poor hygiene standards and very poor customer service

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Spring mattress is really old rather small for 2 and not comfortable to sleep on Quite old hotel windows do not open felt I wasn t breathing well but probably common in London noisy Can t comment on the food which I didn t experience   Staff agreed to move us to another room since our initial one had unbearable water pipe noise Friendly staff Relatively well located both access to the Tube and the overground and bus 16 going to Victoria Gatwick

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Despite booking online our check in process was very poor on arrival Told on the morning that we hadn t paid for breakfast we had Wanted a 50 deposit for each room wish I ve never ever had to do in any location I ve stayed at Bedroom comfortable but bathroom in very poor condition We certainly would not stay here again   Staff very helpful but very difficult to communicate with Generally clean and tidy in communal areas

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The staff were not friendly and the room we were checked into smelled strongly of vomit When we asked to change rooms the staff acted like it was an immense burden and just gave us a new key for a different without smiling or saying anything The rooms are very small   The breakfast was nice

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Very small rooms even though paid extra for King A bit to far from central London if you want to go out at night   The decor was nice and staff were friendly

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Small room Not so pleasent staff Room had a weird smell didn t smell fresh Had to look at 2 other rooms because the first room we was in was so small it s ridiculous

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Shower had a low ceiling room had no window Shower was also only luke warm in the morning Breakfast was over priced so didnt bother Staff said there was nowhere to get food after midnight so i walked outside and walked 30 seconds and bought hot food corridors are like rabbit warrens   King size bed was nice and large room was modern had green tea

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room wasnt finished it looked like it was being refurbed No curtain on the window and it was very small having to go sideways round the bed   Comfy bed

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I lost a t shirt that was never returned to me also the next door room was making a lot of noise shouts etc and the hotel staff never managed to control them

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: No complaints   Very clean air conditioner actually worked the rooms were not noisy where I stayed 203 and the bed was comfy Location is a quick walk from the tube station A bar is close along with a convenience store and coffee shop Their restaurant looked clean but I didn t eat there Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Our bathroom was not clean at all The sink still had vomit stains form the previous client Also the sit of the toilet was dirty They could not give us a new room and as there was only one person of the staff he couldn t clean it for us Just disgusting I would never come back

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The rooms are small no room to walk round the bed as it is pushed up under the window We had to report a few maintenance issues in the bathroom We didn t get a quiet room as requested and overlooked the busy street   The bed was very comfy and the full english breakfast delicious and plentiful Great tea making facilities in room and lovely towels

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was Weird Small room oversized bed wardrobe door couldn t be opened as a bolt in the ceiling prevented it bathroom basin very high even for me air con was vague at best Check in was at 2 we had to sit and wait until 3 not ideal as we had plans and a schedule on our whistlestop stay   The staff were most friendly and made my daughter feel special I liked the effort they afforded us

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: the whole experience in this hotel was horrendous not one single English speaking person at all what bar person doesn t understand the word COCA COLA What manager of a hotel doesn t understand when you ask for a pint of peroni and thinks your asking for a cake MENU was rubbish not even bacon on the breakfast menu its all catered for other nationalities Lighting in the rooms is shocking we stayed in the executive suite and not a window in there at all its right next to the cleaning cupboard where the cleaners think its ok to be banging doors at 7 0clock in the morning The area this place is in is a run down high street with none stop traffic and police sirens constantly Its suppose to be in Camden when its no where near Camden you have to catch a bus to get to Camden which is a half hour ride away No way could you go out here at night the area is too intimidating   nothing at all

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Extremely small room poorly cared for broken blinds rickety lights with sealed glazed window and no temperature control Did not have a great sense of building security   Restaurant staff was pleasant Room was quiet Not connected to major subway lines but good bus service near door

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room had no window it was in the basement I didn t like that at all However it was v quiet Loud Air Con came on at 4 am for some reason Breakfast ok except coffee from a vacuum jug lukewarm why not use the coffee machine behind the bar PS don t put lettuce in a full English breakfast under poached eggs it doesn t go with the other food   Room bathroom very comfortable and good decor Very pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Staff on check in were blunt and un smiling Not the best welcome Paid for upgraded room which looked tired and in need of redecorating   Comfy bed and Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The executive room was small There was a window but it was a little hazy not very clean and this meant that there wasn t much light the key card only seemed to work once so every time I left I had to ask for my card to be reactivated The wifi was the same the vouchers didn t always work and they only lasted for 24 hours   It was clean and the bed was quite comfortable

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The staff can t speak english Its poor value for money The shower wasent clean its like someone had already had a shower before me The bed sheets were dusty and the carpet wasent clean either The window in the room was closed and i could see the roof and i could rats squeaking The breakfast is shocking and staff very rude  Just the location is good

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Dingy basement room with no windows Underneath the kitchen so really loud bangs and scrapes from 6am onwards and a constant dripping water sound from pipes all night a terrible night s sleep

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room size was very small the noise of the road was very loud needs new window improvements Reception desk were not helpful  Very close to the tube station and nearby cheap overnight parking for 15

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Rude staff cramped room with no window food left out and being attacked by flies no way to get rid of them as no window no hot water tired and dirty looks nothing like the photos on website   Nothing at all

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Unspecified deposit to pay at the desk Continental breakfast should include more savory foods   Good size bed and bathroom Clean and quiet Good continental breakfast in a pleasent dining room

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: king bed rooms are so small it is just a big bed Noisy main street No mini bar in the room even empty one Some of the staff were unprofessional  the price compared to other hotels in London that week was significantly lower

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Standard of maintenance was less than good Lights out in the bathroom loo roll holder hanging of the wall nothing major just not quite on point The bed was way too small for a genuine double   Close to tube and rail connections close to good bars too

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: It is impossible to shower without flooding the bathroom and the rooms is pretty dusty It was not dirty bathroom was especially okay but there is room for improvement on the house keeping side   The neighbourhood is not the best but the connection to the city center is great There are a supermarkt and shops and restaurants in walking distance Bus link and overground is in front of the house and tube around the corner It is not a hotel I would book for a romantic get away but it is functional and okay for the price Wifi important for me was excellent My room as not too small and I had a window executive room

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I have a Gluten Free diet and emailed beforehand but on arrival there was no GF food After a struggle to get the staff to understand what GF diet is they did kindly go to a local store and get some GF bread However nothing more was available for breakfast Also the bar closed at 11pm which we felt was a little early with no way of getting a drink plus outside chairs tables were taken in at 10 10 30pm as a smoker too there was nowhere to sit outside after this time

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Complex building layout took some time to find the room Room was shaking possibly caused by cars driving just around the hotel Maid was too early cleaning up room check out time 12 00 maid came to clean at 10 00   Very well continental breakfast Room is very clean Convenient to travel

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The food was disgusting and came to the table with foreign objects included personal to whoever cooked it which put everyone off their food Staff did not understand English which made communication very difficult Ordering a taxi took 20 minutes to convince reception that we did not want to go to the airport we want to go to the theater overall very bad experience will never stay there again   The rooms were comfortable enough

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Personnel could be more friendly Room was not very clean and clearly needed refurbishment The window was facing noisy street and had only single glazing so it was very noisy in the room   Not far from the tube station you can get to city center in 15 min Good value for money

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Apparently no twin rooms with windows so we had to stay in the cellar Room smelled like somebody had smoked in it sometime in the past TV screen had some technical issues everything in green and blue moving or touching the cable would cause signal issues   Breakfast offered toast crepes muffins cereal Restaurant with special offers like Happy Hour restricted choice 2 types of pizza 2 types of pasta Tesco and Starbucks right across the street Very close to underground station Kilburn Park Bed comfortable and rain shower nice Tea and coffee refilled safe in wardrobe hair dryer and even sewing kit in drawer Friendly staff they all seemed to be Italian Towels exchanged regularly Wifi worked fine passwords were exchanged every 24 hours

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: room had no window bit closed in feeling one member of staff tried to be friendly but she was the only one the other staff couldn t so much as manage a smile Didn t like being asked for a 50 cash deposit which I hadn t been made aware of before stay felt rather put on the spot Room was clean and well presented although felt like we had been stuck in a broom cupboard Especially as had to walk through hotel storage area to get to the room poor internet only one of us could use connection at a time The position of tv meant could only be viewed from one of the beds although in view of fact we couldn t actually receive a picture due to being in the basement this wasn t a problem   clean room modern decoration good shower

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The breakfast is not good The lift was out of service for two days long   Location is quite close to the Kilburn Park station Quite a lot local shops nearby for shopping

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: i was given a 1st floor room which was reached via 1st floor by elevator then 2 floors down the basement acessible only by various staircases such as in a labyrnt it was very difficult to reach the room by a suitcase also the room was very very clostrophobic during the stay i was terrified with a thought of fire and not being able to reach outside i dont know how the hotel got any fire licence at all   bed was comfortable and wifi was working efficiently

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Find hair alover bed shits Dust on the cups milk out of date Room definitely not worthet what I paid for   Good privacy standard perfect location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: thought that the continental breakfast was poor in choice  very helpful staff room was clean although window did not open was very well situated for central London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: For 2 people the room was far too small and sloping ceiling made it difficult No plug socket near the kettle Shower water bounced off ceiling and soaked the floor  Nice big bathroom and good breakfast

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Another case of a let down in London This hotel does in my eyes not qualify for 4 stars The lift was broken for 3 days I was on the top floor which shows little care for customer experience The housekeeping was at best basic and rubbish was left on the floor for the 6 nights I stayed Bed comfort is basic and only 2 small pillows are provided Under the sheets I found several pubic hairs There is no hairdryer or iron for clothing The reception was left unattended at night at several occasions which is a security issue as anyone can walk in I also called for a wake up call without anyone answering for at least 10 minutes so this is not an occasional fault The walls are thin and housekeeping make no effort in keeping their business quiet I would pay tops 60 per night for this property

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Air conditioner was not working so the room was hot as sauna and nobody fixed it nor find another room for me with good air conditioner  Reception staff we re lovely

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: When I booked I was told my room has no window but I was given a window room which was set on the busy road side The traffice and noise disturbed my sleep Also the air con was not working   Comfy bed

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Hair in my bed sheets and broken toilet flusher When i complained in the morning was too late when i got in at 2am they didnt take me seriously  Modern style and close to the local tube station

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: No sheets on sofa bed despite assurances went to reception at 2100 but told No housekeeping available Asked for more pillows but non available very poor  Location Near Tube Room was clean

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Shower leaked so covered ceiling and bathroom in water shower plumbed wrong so hot and cold water opposite way round toilet roll holder was hanging off wall bathroom light switch was located OUTSIDE the room in the corridor Room was on the fourth floor took 3 attempts by reception to get the key to work breakfast was awful Requested twin room had a double Sheets were dirty and floors not cleaned Not recommended   Bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We did not like location of our room situated in the cellars without any outside windows The wardrobe was only accessible by anyone at least eight foot tall We complained but no action taken by the staff Not a best Weston More a mediocre Weston  Good bus service to centre of London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The hotel has a very strange layout lots of winding corridors and stairs We ended up in a tiny room in the middle of the building with no windows You couldn t open the door to the bathroom fully because of the bed and there was a sofa right in front of the entrance The room was also damp It was expensive for what it was   Good location close to a few different tube stations

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Overall I enjoyed my stay but I would like to point out some of the issues that I had experienced The single bed was narrower than my experience of other hotels and wasn t comfortable Also the fridge in the room hadn t been connected and I was unable to get the socket in and when reported to the two men at reception in the morning they promised to have it fixed but they hadn t when I returned in the evening   The hotel was accessible to local shops and eating places The room was spacious and had all the amenities required

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room was dirty Pillows were hard and towels were dirty When new towels requested receptionist told us to collect them from reception Used makeup wipe left from last resident behind sink   Location was great

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Shower and bathroom were not clean when we arrived so asked for it to be redone We also got woken up on Sunday morning by a house keeper by mistake and them no apology I mentioned this at the desk but no real concern shared   Beds were comfy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: London prices for hotels and had to keep asking breakfast staff for crockery and food ie ran out of fruit and bread and staff had difficulty understanding when asked them for more food to be put out on the breakfast counter   The review score is a little low iwould give 7 8 hotel ideal for using train to Euston or Wembley stadium Bedroom very practical clean and modern ideal hotel for a one night stay

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Poor assortment of coffee only decaff offered Could have done with double the amount and a few biscuits On arrival we were desperate for a hot drink after a 3 hour train journey Then on returning from Wembley which took til 1am we had the other 2 sachets of decaff coffee leaving none for the morning before we went down to breakfast For the small cost involved it would have completed our stay   Overall good location for Wembley staduium away from the crowds Pleasant welcome as we arrived and very helpful Room was small but adequate with everything we needed Continental breakfast was good Would definitely book again

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Our executive king room was a cramped cave without windows We moved rooms to something a bit larger but which overlooked an alley frequented by drugs transactions and multitudes of rats MULTITUDES We could see the open doorway to the hotel kitchen in this rat infested alley Needless to say room service was no longer an option To cap off our stay the King bed was two rock hard singles pushed together If that didn t keep us awake there was a near constant scratching and squeeking behind the walls and in the ceilings   Mmmm not much Close to the tube station

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: My first time to write review There is no window in room I find that it is for almost the whole rooms The smell is not good The staff do not have smile It is not a good experience for me The price is not equal to the service Never come back again

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: No hot water so unable to have a shower Toaster was useless Staff on reception were unhelpful and gave promise that hot water would be available shortly I waited and made myself late for my meeting and yet still no hot water

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: After a booking reservation glitch the hotel made me pay for a night when they had over a week to rebook the room Bad customer relations and very greedy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Staff do not speak fluent English so there was a communication problem which made it difficult to tell them what we wanted No airfreshners in hallways and elevator was small and smelly No room or bathroom slippers available Had to request toothbrushes Toilet was hard to flush no toilet brush and large shower head was broken Crossiants were stale and no eggs included in breakfast deal Would have liked mini fridge in bedroom for cold water   Shops near hotel are convenient Air conditioned rooms Plenty of lighting in room Clean bathroom

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room is too small even i booked supirior sweet but then they informed me that they have one type of room and that was different what Booking mention Towels are dirty   Price

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I paid 129 for a executive room with king size bed and got 2 single beds pushed together The hotel also had no hot water the following morning so me and my partner were unable to wash Not happy   The location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: after a booking glitch I was made to pay for a night even when they had a week to rebook the room Not customer friendly and very greedy Most of the fittings in the bathroom needed maintenance Don t have happy memories of the experience

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I bought breakfast with the room but make note that only includes continental If you want a full English youll need about 10 more pp  The room was very nice only issues was that we couldn t open the window but it did have air con The location is so ideal being about 15 minute drive away from Covent Garden Central London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: No cable tv My room was very small and crammed No work desk No concierge service   It s ease of accessibility Excellent free wifi service Generally neat

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The main issue for me was cleanliness and this led to me complaining in the end However in addition there was no hot water on my first night or the next morning so it was not possible to shower No information was provided either I had to ask reception who said there had been a problem with the boiler no apology or compensation etc The fridge was not working was dirty and when I investigated the plug found the socket hanging from the wall The window couldn t be opened which made the room claustrophobic despite the air con However the final straw was on the last night when I got in bed I noticed there seemed to be a plastic based sheet under the main bedsheet It didn t seem to fit properly and so I investigated and found an under sheet made of plastic towelling top this was badly stained had hair on it and was filthy I took this off and remade the bed At the same time 10 45 pm a fire alarm also went off It did stop after a minute or so but I was concerned and rang reception however the line was dead and I had to ring from my mobile to get through Everything was fine but this was another thing not working also one of the bedside lights I told the receptionist re sheet the next morning and asked a manager to go and look at it before the room was made up I asked that I have a response from the manager when I picked my case up However there was no message for me and as there was a different receptionist I decided to email my complaint So far I have had no reply So pretty poor and i would not recommend this hotel which charged me 96 per night I did not eat there so can t comment on food etc   Location was good for course I attended and near train station

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Lack of english breakfast only continental breakfast Espresso and cappuccino with extra costs  Position close to underground bus with line 189 u can reach oxford circus in 30 min and many shops Very confortable beds

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: It smelt very strongly of stale cigarettes and it was very stuffy I had to buy some air freshener to get rid of the smell   It was a great location The room was a good size and bathroom was lovely

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The restaurant limited in dishes and service but no complaints Thanks a lot to Nuria at rexeption deak who was very friendly and took care of all our enquiries with pleasure Definitely would stay again for the kind hospitality received   The attentive staff

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Oh lordy where to start We booked in to be told we were in a basement room fine no problems here we are semi normal 30 year old healthy women I walk into the pitch black room in search of the light switch key activation to disappear down 4 yes 4 bloody steps Thank God I love cake because I survived unhurt due to my padding The air con was useless which turned the room into a sweaty crypt trust me when your my age you need make up and water to stay in your body to look ok Hence why I spent the trip looking like a dishevelled old dehydrated lady The stairs and under them doubles as a cleaning store cupboard and smelt like an old ladies crutch Now I am 32 with kids I stay in a hotel the key thing for me is sleep the fact every time someone else above us flushed the loo we were transported us into what life as a waterfall fairy would be was fun the first time not so much after that The fact that from 6am every day the cleaning people started what u can only describe as a team relay up and down the stairs was exciting just mean they should be in Rio one of those buggers is really quick The staff were lovely unable to move us or help but lovely to look at Fine hotel just don t accept the crypt rooms you may not survive Falls dehydration and lack of sleep will get you   The location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: They need a bell man and carts to put the luggage on because the donot have such an important service and the wifi for the internet sould be connected the whole stay instead of the daily vouchers  Location and ease of logistics to everywhere

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Bathroom was a little unfinished as there was some patch work and painting that had been started but not finished but didn t take away from a nice bathroom  Bed was amazing and so comfortable after a long day of sightseeing Staff were friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The king size room was clean and tidy and the en suite was a nice size however we didn t like the shower and set up of the bathroom because there was a drain in the middle of the bathroom and when in the shower due to the size and where the shower was the water went everywhere and everywhere was left wet once you had showered Needs a short screen or curtain to stop this from happening The bed wasn t the most comfortable and the walls are thin to the point I could hear the man upstairs conversation when he woke me up at 4am The staff were lovely and friendly and did all they could to make the stay enjoyable

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Full_Review: There was no one on reception and we had to wait once we alerted the bar staff that we had been standing aroundo Customers personal details were left out on the reception desk for all to see including full card numbers breaching Dat a Privacy and PCI requirements The more expensive room Executive compared to the the standard twin was really tight and difficult to move around the bed Left message for manager to call me still haven t heard from him Altogether a very disappointing stay   The bed was comfortable The bathroom was nice but the shower was making a very loud noise which did not make the experience pleasant Especially when you are trying to sleep and you can hear the shower in the next room

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: No bowls available at breakfast Waitress told my younger cousin that this was basically tough It wasn t until I complained and asked to speak to a manager that we were actually given a bowl How did they expect us to eat cereal Room was far too hot and the air conditioning was poor We were close to stairs down to the basement and were woken any time somebody walked up or down them Nobody at reception asked us how our stay had been at check out I m guessing this was because they already knew our answer   The room was well presented Close location to tube although I would say this is more Kilburn Park than Maida Vaile so was a little disappointed when we arrived

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We had room 3 in the basement so no natural light noisy with the fan stuffy but very quiet without it ok for our one night stay A bit pricey but then that s London   Two very nice reception staff

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Unfortunately the one thing that stands out for us is when my wife fell on the staircase on the first floor There is an unexpected step right on the landing as you move along the first floor landing I am describing this in detail in case it might help others to avoid the problem My wife fell quite badly injuring wrists knee and ankle Fortunately she could still walk though with difficulty I think the unexpected step on the first floor landing should be sorted out in some way signeage or putting in a sloping gradient but what was very disappointing is that when this was all reported to reception there was no action no information no sympathy or concern Nothing was recorded at the hotel Even just some information about nearby medical facilities would have been some help As a result we spent the morning searching for medical assistance eventually ending up getting a bus to an urgent care centre in White City There my wife had x rays and very good treatment Unfortunately this has coloured our view of the hotel measures should be taken to warn people about the step and those on reception should be trained to respond properly to accidents   This is a good Best Western hotel when you consider the problems of running a hotel in a fairly old London building Breakfast was very good with a wide choice of fruit cereals and hot buffet The rates which include breakfast are fairly good value compared with the rather steep breakfast charge if paid on the day The staff were excellent overall very friendly and helpful particularly in the breakfast dining room Generally fairly good and good value considering London hotel prices

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Asked for ID passport driving licence etc Has never happened to me before in a UK hotel Britain abandoned the national identity card scheme many years ago and there is no obligation for a British citizen to carry ID and I don t usually carry my passport with me If it is hotel policy that you have to provide ID then this should be stated on your booking pages Incidentally the Best Western in Bournemouth never asked so I am somewhat dubious this is the case   Highest concentration of plug sockets and light switches I have ever encountered in a hotel room 3 double sockets in the desk area alone Inadvertently switched the heated towel rail on but never managed to find the switch that did it to turn it off Despite the baffling array of switches very comfy and good value for central London Staff friendly

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Cleanliness decor looking tatty bathroom sealant messy scuffs on walls blind looked as if a dog had wrestled with it No draught beer in bar guinness was undrinkable  Location modern

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: My room 113 was exceptionally small So small my shins hit the end of the wooden bed frame when I walked in the room I would go so far as to say they have squished a double bed into a box room No space at all to manoeuvre around the room and that was with one side of the bed shoved up against the wall Also no mirror in the bedroom there was a huge mirror in the bathroom but not much use when wanting to dry my hair of check I was presentable There was a small window that doesn t open outside of which was clearly home to the pigeons Rudely awoken by the cooing at 5am wasn t great  The reception staff were helpful and friendly Check in was smooth Service with a smile Bar dining area was pleasant with a small but varied menu the food was very good Breakfast complimentary continental there was enough choice to start the day and for those with a bigger appetite you can order a cooked breakfast from the menu at a reasonable price 3 minute walk from Kilburn station

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The staff were extremely poor Firstly the gentlemen behind the desk said we can pay on checkout as we bothwere paying cash next minute he had taken out of my card i booked with which left me overdrawn and charged Awful Secondly for breakfast the lady serving us got our breakfast wrong THREE times I am still shocked we paid for it

Full_Review: First of all I was given a small room with no air conditioning remote control a tv remote control or a telephone I used my mobile phone to call down and ask for these things plus an iron and after 40 minutes I decided to get dressed and head to reception were I was told the guy I spoke to had forgot about my call I eventually got the above items ironed my shirt and was heading out when I switched off the iron which caused the socket to blow sparks and the room electrics to trip out Another call to reception and they decided to move me into another room The next night whilst sat on my bed doing some work on my laptop one of the reception staff decided to open my door and show in an old couple who appeared to be shocked by the sight of me in my underpants No apology just everyone turning around and walking out again Not a good experience and not one word of apology for any of it suggests the staff are used to this kind of stuff   Staff did their best room was clean but small Nicely decorated

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The receptionist who booked me in was excellent and could not do enough

I did not prefer the bathroom When we took shower the water will spill out That means we have to be more careful at the lavatory   One room is enough for four people The staff will come to your room to manage the sofa bed

Long walk to the end of corridor furthest from lift when hotel obviously not full still availability on websites   Comfy bed large walk in shower all you needed for a short break when you are out all day sightseeing

The room was not prepared for the expected number of guests In fact we were expecting a 3 people room but were allocated to a double room with additional folded up bed There was no towels or toiletries for three and glasses and cups were not in the room In general not much space for three people and lack of attention to the detail and guests comfort We needed to ask for a steam room and sauna to be turned on after finding out that they were completely cold when we turned up to use them We needed to ask for dressing gowns and slippers as they were nowhere to be seen   Staff were very nice

The bathroom was a wet room and the whole floor flooded when we had a shower we had to soak up all the water with the towels It left the floor really slippy which was dangerous   Good location 5 mins walk to the tube Also really close to borough markets Hotel room was nice

the Gym is rather small bathroom in the room also small   modern and airy hotel excellent location walking distance to everything shops restaurants pubs museum theatare tube station and yet very quiet Comfortable bed Friendly helpful and enthusiastic staff breakfast had lots of variety all fresh delicious and replenished quickly Also a must try are the sweet potato fries chips from the bar
location good with access to city but abandoned at night and not very safe feeling Bleak   staff helpful location to train and bridge access for city

The buffet is the same every day They make their scrambled eggs and bacon in a very unnapealing manner and there is no station to request them as u like Near a bus line but multiple changes always needed   Staff are very helpful and speak multiple languages The decor of the room is unique

Not keen on the open plan washbasin Makes the room look very untidy with wash bags etc Would only stay with family would have been very uncomfortable if staying with a friend for example getting out of the shower and reaching for a towel can only look glamorous in films

Unfortunately we didn t get to sleep in the hotel on the second night   The staff were excellent and on the night of the third some were up all night with the problems caused by a nearby incident The local area is normally very safe

The a c isn t very cold At all And no pool  The location was convenient and safe Easy for the train and bus Restaurants and pubs and coffee all close by Hotel was good Clean quiet Staff was helpful and friendly Nice bath products as well

At 9 30 am we were woken up with a male staff coming into our room with his key He was obviously the cleaner I managed to get up and alert him we were in the room He apologised and went I complained to the staff on check out but they just said that the staff have no way of knowing whether people have checked out of their rooms or not Unbelievable in this day age with all the technology Anyway it s no excuse as check out is not until 12 noon so they should have checked then We hadn t got to bed until 3 30am from our night out so when he appeared he woke us all up and that was it we were awake angry to say the least When I complained the staff offered us a free drink in the bar I refused as we were on our way into London and a free drink does not make up for the lack of sleep What was turning out a great stay ended up as a disaster   The location was perfect as we were on a night out at the Shard Room was great for 3 of us and the hotel gave us cakes as it was my daughters birthday Everything was great until 9 30 am the next morning

Staff in restaurant needs a lot of training on Customer service We went to restaurant at 22pm and we were informed that we cannot sit in restaurant that should be open until 23 00 as we are too late As a solution they sat us at the bar which would not be a problem if we would not hear the constant noise of setting up the whole bar for breakfast at 10pm on Saturday night Except one gentelman in the bar I think he was from Romania no one paid attention to us We were the only customers eating and the waitress made us feel like she wanted to get rid of us as soon as possible Our main courses were served together with desserts so you can image our face when we received icream with burgers the same time The excuse was that restaurant is closed It was only 22 30 so it took them 30 min to prepare it They completely missed the fact you could order iceream 24 7 so I m not sure why they could not wait until we finish our mains Food was poor quality too probably rushed to be prepared so staff can go home The whole experience was horrible and we did not go to breakfast because of that Hotel is lovely but now we know the reason why your restaurant is empty on Saturday night We were laughing next day that you can get more friendly service at McDonalds than at 4star hotel restaurant In addition please review this comments as opportunity for improvement I am not a needy customer in fact I used to work as assistant Manager in one of UKs Novetels during my studies and from what I remember it was a high standard restaurant It s a shame this is not the case anymore   Room was lovely Very clean Good location

This is a really insignificant comment I m going to have to dig deep to complain but here it goes The wall between the bathroom and bedroom is glass half of which is frosted There is no door on the WC so privacy is an issue however on our second night we learned that the small button next to the bath cleverly turned the unfrosted part of the glass wall frosted making the bathroom completely private My complaint we had to find this out for ourselves a note explaining the operation of the button would have helped So there you go that explains what we did t like If that is your only complaint you re going to enjoy a great stay at this hotel   Really good hotel in a great location The hotel has its own car parking unusual for central London Rooms are stylish and contemporary and have everything you need If you don t want budget and want to avoid the heavy costs of 5 stars the Novotel is a perfect fit

They advertise free wifi but at check in I received a free wifi voucher which was valid for 5 days only and we had booked and stayed 6 nights They would have probably provided an extra voucher if I asked but it is a bit shortsighted on their part When booking we asked for a room above the street ground level but the room allocated to us was in fact on ground level and facing the back yard Although this was a slight disappointment the silver lining was that the room had a private veranda with a bench and a table and my wife and I actually spent many quiet moments there reminiscing on the day s sights and activities In the time we spent there we had breakfast only once as we mostly ate on foot through out town I felt that the options and food selections are slightly scanty and minimalistic but this seems normal for most small hotels and establishments I did not leave hungry though The complimentary coffee and tea in our room were not replenished daily which is a bit of a surprise because the way I see it if lodgers change daily the staff would have to refill these for the new guests Because of this and the wifi issue mentioned earlier and considering the price range of this hotel I could not help getting a tiny feeling of stinginess and parsimoniousness on part of the staff management but this is just a minor feeling perhaps not even worth writing about   The location is beautiful The entire area is surrounded by museums Both Hyde Park and the Royal Albert Hall are 2 3 minutes away just up the street The hotel is clean and the staff are helpful and very friendly Because the hotel is pretty small nestled in an old London house this makes it very quiet with a strong feeling of privacy compared to larger hotels Nothing in particular stands out to be praised The rooms are what one would expect Bedding is clean and soft the beds are comfortable

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: A little bit expensive but worth it if you want to be in the Ile Saint Louis   The staff working in the hotel was superb Very helpful on everything very good English Great location Metro and RER station near by

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: nothing we plan to stay here again on our ext visit to Paris   Staff were extremely accommodating and friendly The room while not large was comfortable with adequate storage space for clothes The neighbourhood was amazing with shops restaurants and speciality purveyors nearby 5 minute walk to metro a little difficult if you have more than one bag but easy if you are bagless

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Exceptional hotel fabulous rooms very friendly and helpful staff great location for local boutique shopping as well as exploring Paris Such a beautiful area We were very impressed

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The room we got was small with a mattress that hurt my back and a window open to a smoking area for guests I eventually asked to change rooms and was moved The in house breakfast is 20 euro per person and made breakfast a headache Overall this didn t feel like a four star hotel to me   The location is central and convenient The staff was friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: No tea and coffee making facilities in the room but I think hat is pretty common in Europe   Perfect location in a quiet central part of Paris Lots of restaurants nearby Lovely rooms

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Breakfast was not included Continental Breakfast for 18 euros Found better breakfast in neighborhood for less than 10 euros WiFi was weak and dropped out   NIce Hotel In historic building Great Friendly staff Close to several attractions and fairly close to Metro

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The room was quite dark with poor lighting and the mattress too soft for my liking Breakfast was not included in rate and given the price not as good as hoped the coffee was often only lukewarm the cheese and ham processed   The location is excellent The staff is very friendly It is quaint and has interesting features

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: There was a note on the desk in our room asking that food and drinks not be brought into the room for your comfort however a mini bar was located in the room with drinks and nuts for purchase   The staff was extremely friendly and helpful We enjoyed the accommodations The reason I didn t recommend this room for families is that the second bed couch was located on the first floor with the exterior door and the bedroom is upstairs Great location

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The interior of this hotel is I would say unique The building is lovely and they have done an amazing job of redeveloping it into a stylish and extremely comfortable hotel Our room was lovely as well as quiet The Hotel is in a fabulous location The street is vibrant during the day and quieter at night The Ile Saint Louis generally is the perfect place to stay to explore the centre of Paris There are plenty of places to eat nearby and it is a 3 minute walk to Notre Dame and the Siene Highly recommend in every way We also fell in love with the Hotel dog even though we only saw it once all too briefly

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The bed was very comfortable The room was a nice size tastefully decorated in a modern french country design Amazing support beams artfully refinished throughout the whole structure Is both comfortable and artsy The staff are exceedingly helpful and friendly they take the time out for you to make reservations help you find facilities and anything else your heart desires The location is amazing You just walk out the door and there are amazing restaurants wonderful boutiques small grocery fresh fruit markets pharmacy and anything else that you might want An 8 minute walk to the front of Notre Dame Cathedral Staying on Ile St Louis was very pleasant experience and this hotel is outstanding I will stay at this hotel my next trip to Paris

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Being upgraded from Duplex suite in hotel beautiful to an apartment not whats advertised Felt like a bait and switch to me   Location was awesome Easy distance to Notre Dame and many bars restaurants

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The room smelled from mould Strange fee for about 9 Euros if you opened a bottle of vine in your room   The champagne from the bar was exquisite The hotel was beautiful with a perfect location

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: No such thing   Such warm welcoming and helpful staff Genuinely helpful Very cute hotel on the dream location that you almost don t need to leave and still experience the charm of Paris The room was not on the bigger side nothing unusual for the European hotels but it was well designed so nothing was lacking

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Room typically quite small Could hear neighbors occasionally   Superb location on the island can go south to blvd St Michel west to Notre Dame and north to rue de Rivoli Very quiet room Lovely conversion of old timbered building with modern internal structures

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Breakfast seems to be a bit expensive for what it serves   All the staff members were very kind and friendly room was very clean and all the tourist sites were within walking distance

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: A suite with three beds should really have three places to sleep instead of one double bed and a small couch with a pillow The part downstairs did not have a single chair or a piece of furniture Come to think of it the couch is downstairs but the television is upstairs   The location of the hotel is amongst the best in the world Period As one who is in the know of the appartment prices in the same street as the hotel the room prices are actually not that much higher than regular rent of a place of similar size The room size is also quite decent albeit inefficiently used

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Wish the twin room beds were farther apart but not possible because of the fixed wall shelf A small detail that wouldn t deter me from staying here again   Perfect location helpful staff clean room lovely common areas easy access via public transportation

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The price of breakfast was too expensive for what it was   The location and customer service was excellent Everything was within walking distance The staff made fabulous restaurant recommendations and assisted with directions and taxi reservations

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The breakfast at 18 euros was a bit expensive try the Cafe St Regis instead for fresh eggs and real atmosphere   Location is great Ile St Louis is a great base and this hotel is set back from the roads so super quiet Rooms a bit larger than average and atrium lobby and breakfast bar area is very nice

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Front desk staff was VERY helpful Made dinner reservations for us gave directions and instructions on how to take RER to CDG Wonderful old building updated and decorated with an artist s eye

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Breakfast was OK great fresh buns and Croissant but pure verity of cheese  Location Location Location Beautiful interior design the room was nice comfortable in a good size Very Good Wi Fi

Full_Review: Walls between rooms were thin was woken on the second night at 2am by people talking in their room next door One bedside lamp fitting in the room didn t work Shower was weak pressure and small I m 6 foot and couldn t fit underneath the shower head which is fixed in place   Room was good size staff were very friendly good location

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The room described by Booking com as s Superior Double didn t meet my expectations I wouldn t want to stay in a normal double It was exceptionally cramped with poor quality fittings in the bedroom The hotel website makes no mention of such a room and in fact the room we had looks most like what it describes as a single room albeit with a double bed I feel a bit let down   Location can t be bettered Ideal for walking and situated in a street with restaurants and even some proper shops

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Our room didn t have enough light for reading in bed   It s hard to believe such a central Paris location could be so peaceful Helpful staff Easy to reach from the metro

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Breakfast could have been better but with so many good crepe shops and cafes nearby it wasn t any problem   The location of this hotel on Ile St Louis is ABSOLUTELY FABULOUS Easy walk to Notre Dame St Chappelle nearby museums and great eateries General Manager Natalie and her staff were very friendly and helpful And you re just a few steps from the best ice cream and gelato in all of Paris Amarino Bertillion Although the rooms are somewhat small the hotel has a wonderful lobby relaxing area downstairs While we were in Paris there were lots of concerts special events going on around the area but our hotel on Ile St Louis remained nice quiet

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Phone coverage wasn t good calls were breaking up Wifi not good   Great welcome Good and quiet room Nice toilletries All what was needed Nice breakfast Very good service

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The rooms are compact and hotel lacks some important extras view gym fast internet etc that might warrant the price tag Some of the staff were very warm and friendly others less so   It s a very tasteful and interesting restoration of a building with a unique history It is also beautifully located close to everything in a calm and graceful area

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Nothing   Just wonderful The history of the place the staff couldn t do enough for you The location was prime The breakfast was lovely croissants just to die for

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Can t really think of anything at all   Wonderfully welcoming pleasant front desk staff Location right in the heart of Paris on Ile St Louis really couldn t not be beat Given the location the price was understandable and the quality of the accommodations bed comfort room bathroom etc was really quite high

Full_Review: The European pillows were a bit firm If you need a softer pillow ask the staff   The staff are what make this hotel extra special Location is fantastic A little Paris in Paris Lots of lovely restaurants and cafes and shops all around you Close to metro transport All the facilities you need in a hotel are available I ll be back

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Wish I could have stayed longer   Off the busy street of shops and ice cream parlors on the I lle Saint Louis we walked through the big doors into a tranquil courtyard with the fragrance of star jasmine The staff was lovely There is a living room lounge and bar Great artwork and a tasteful renovation to a very old charming building Big glass elevator Easy card access to room Quiet beautiful room with old beamed ceiling and all else newly appointed

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: We were in twin beds and they were touching each other so very close This can t be helped in Paris however as the hotel rooms are typically very small   Beds were comfortable Staff was super friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: While the room size was small the public areas made up for this Staff very friendly   The ambiance stylish yet inviting The different public areas in which to relax were especially nice tastefully done very comfortable atmosphere

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Breakfast wasn t included which was unfortunate But a decent bakery was right down the street as well as a few cafes   The hotel is located on the quiet end of the street but only a 2 minute walk to cafes and brasseries facing Notre Dame Rooms were super quiet very comfortable and spacious Full size bathtub was great at the end of a long day of walking The staff were very friendly and helpful Will stay here again

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Nice bathroom but we had some issues with water escaping from the shower area and wetting the floor Enlarging the glass panels might help   Friendly staff Beautifully done interiors mixing the historic with the modern Clean room comfortable and quiet

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The breakfast was either a full one or nothing There was no in between cup of coffee and croissant   Charming hotel centrally located Helpful staff and lovely rooms

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The staff was fantastic They were very kind and helpful and were quite gracious They were knowledgeable about local restaurants and activities such as concerts at Saint Chapelle The hotel was very quiet unique and clean The breakfast and coffee were delicious The location of the hotel was excellent It was easy to access from the airport CDG within walking distance to all the major museums and very safe

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Rooms and bathroom a bit small   Perfect location on the Ille with access to all parts of Paris Super friendly and efficient staff and management Rustic French charm and atmosphere Lemon the dog adds the the authenticity Room with window out onto quiet forecourt Separate toilet

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The front desk staff were terrific helpful and always friendly and patient The atmosphere of the hotel is a warm and welcoming one We would definitely stay there again and will recommend it to our friends traveling to Paris

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Too many tourists includes us Location location location separate toilet does not have a wash basin have to walk around to bathroom pillows are square and a little overfull for my old neck synthetic doona but no sheet which we prefer full length hanging space beside bed a little oppressive bedside tables a little cramped due to that   good continental breakfast buffet style close to left bank for cheap breakfast out less traffic noise than anywhere else we have stayed in Paris good location for central attractions great walking starting point lovely old building with tasteful renovation to convert tennis court to hotel retaining much of the charm common areas comfortable and open wifi works friendly welcoming helpful and warm staff not stuffy or reserved Happy to use english when they saw us struggle in french helped correct my abysmal pronunciation and improved my vocab towels were good temperature regulation good room deliberately dark furniture to show off old beams to their best we had room 002 with windows opening onto the courtyard originally court they use in fine weather for breakfast Also adjacent to common areas but not noisy while we were there we are early sleepers and risers so walking the Ile was tourist free early adequate numbers of power points to recharge all our devices Samsung LED tv has hdmi access in desktop for playback of movies on your device also good sattelite choice we prefer french stations did not look for CNN or BBC world we booked on a whim and were pleased with room facilities and ambience would happily go there again

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Look it s an amazing old historic building But why oh why must the teensy toilet room and tiny shower room be separate The light switches were falling off and it seems ridiculous that you are required to use your one room key to power the electricity in the room So one of two occupants can never be in the room alone   Great sitting areas AMAZING location Location can t be beat

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The 18 euro breakfast was steep for what you got and if you added eggs you added another 8 euros to it   The location was great Lots of good eating places to choose from In a very quaint area

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: Extra cost for breakfast a bit high but delicious   Friendly helpful staff Characterful charming and comfortable hotel in a wonderful location Plenty of excellent restaurants within 5 minutes walk

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The staff were outstanding They made our family feel completely welcome They made excellent recommendations for neighborhood restaurants cafes and shops The design of the hotel within the landmark building is unique and shows tasteful renovation carefully integrated with the modern necessities that maintain the historic atmosphere We wish the weather had been warmer so we could use the garden spaces The lobby was a cozy place to relax and have a cognac by the fire after a cold March evening in Paris Because of the location we walked to almost every location we visited We intend to stay here every time we visit Paris

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: No views from bedrooms but the quietness at night time and the central location more than made up for this   Very comfortable bed and bedrooms of a good size for central Paris Superb location central easy to walk everywhere close to metro but lovely and quiet at night time Lots of cafes and restaurants in the immediate neighbourhood Very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: showers were not enclosed so we had baths instead to avoid flooding floor The small Kitchen was not well enough equipped to cook for 6 only 2 x hotplates plus microwave no oven and very little prep space It would be fine if you are intending to eat out all the time The television only had bbcworld English speaking and CNN Worse thing of all was the extreme levels of noise from outside at night The apartment is situated in an excellent central and charming area of Paris but it is opposite a very popular restaurant which is open every night People congregate noisily outside well into the early hours and have no concept that other residents exist or are trying to sleep Lots of shouting and loud laughter for hours The apartment has wonderful high windows looking onto the street but the glass and shutters don t provide any protection from the noise Quality earplugs are a must Saying this please remember that the apartment is situated infront of the hotel If you are booking a room in the hotel you should be ok because it is set right back away from the street and looks a really nice place to stay A classy mix of old and new   Beautiful characterful and cosy apartment exposed beams stone walls and mezzanine floor 3 x good sized bedrooms and 2 bathrooms with baths Lovely lovely sitting room area but small kitchen Staff helpful and very kind to allow storage of luggage after checkout Situated in lovely area of paris v close to Notre dame the latin quarter and metro Street is full of little boutiques and bakers very close with a small grocers shop for basic provisions just down the way

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: The shower wets the bathroom floor A minor inconvenience that surprisingly you still find in many european hotels   Location could not be better Beautiful hotel nice and comfy room

Full_Review: Very friendly and helpful staff Great location Very comfortable and relaxing stay Room was was a little small but not unusual for this type of hotel in the centre of Paris Would definitely stay again when next in Paris

Full_Review: Room was very small   location was perfect steps from Notre Dame and short walk over the bridge to heart of Paris Walking distance to Louvre Great restaurants steps away Quaint set up

Full_Review: Sound proofing with the adjacent room wasn t perfect but also not a big deal   The front desk staff made us feel at home in Paris very friendly and helpful when we found out that our outgoing flight to Poland was at a different airport 1 5 hours away Location was near everything Louvre etc but also super quiet Perfect for a good night s sleep after a redeye

Full_Review: Staff at front desk was mostly but not always helpful in making arrangements Breakfast was overpriced  Beautiful facility totally charming and a great location

Hotel_Name: H tel Du Jeu De Paume
Full_Review: One of the reason I chose this hotel was to use the jacuzzi I actually called few days before to book the time and I was told it would be ok because it was quiet However when I arrived it was broken down and I was not made aware of it We asked to use the hamam instead but when we went it was turned on at only 26 C instead of 40 so we had to leave before it reached the right temperature It is a shame considering we wanted to relax before jumping on a plane the next day The hotel could be easily regain its luxury status if management invest in updating some of the furniture in the rooms which have clearly aged It remains nevertheless a charming place   The location is unique very close to Notre Dame The building history and the open space are impressive The hotel is hidden at the rear of a street building and it is very calm It was a nice place to finish our European holidays

the price that I was quoted online when I reserved the room was NOT the price that I was charged I was actually charged almost 100lbs more than I was supposed to be this is quite annoying and frankly it is NOT good value for what you obtain for that price I would have booked a more up scale hotel small additional annoying issue the pillows are massive but impossible to sleep on since they are foam and do NOT give so after the first night I had to make my own pillow from a towel and sweaters the tea at breakfast was so weak it was horrible and the coffee tasted horrible also my bathroom door jammed shut and I could not use it one morning and had to leave and asked the hotel staff to repair it good thing I was NOT locked inside   the staff were very nice and very polite

The bed was saggy seemed worn out   We were delighted with the breakfast buffet the warm and friendly staff members made genuine hot chocolate for my daughter upon request Our top floor room faced the back and was very quiet
